consumers.name: consumePayout

downstreamDescriptions.payout-api: POSTs /payout (idempotency_key = payment_order_id) to disburse the seller's amount/currency for each completed order.
downstreamDescriptions.ledger-db: Reads the order's Transactions and the seller's step2b credit LedgerEntry/Account, then writes the step3_payout Transaction plus its debit/credit LedgerEntry pair.

consumers.description:
sharedFunction: commitError() => publish to payout-stream(topic: payout-error, message: request), commit the offset and return from function
query all Transaction(payment_order_id == request.payment_order_id). there should be exactly 3 Transactions (step1_payin, step2a_payin-complete, step2b_fufilled"). 
if there isnt then commitError()
else 
    grab the LedgerEntry(transaction: Transaction(step: step2b_fufilled, direction: credit, Account(owner_id != platform))). 
    call payout-api.payout(MakePayoutRequest(idempotency_key: request.payment_order_id, amount: LedgerEntry.amount, currency: LedgerEntry.currency, recipient: LedgerEntry.account)). 
    if this api call returns an error then commitError()
    else
        create a Transaction/LedgerEntry combo:
        Transaction(payment_order_id: id, step: step3_payout)
            LedgerEntry(account: Account(op.seller_id, null), direction: debit, amount, currency)
            LedgerEntry(account: Account(payout, null), direction: credit, amount, currency)
        if that fails then commitError()
        else commit the offset and return from function

history.description:
sharedFunction: commitError() => publish to payout-stream(topic: payout-error, message: request), commit the offset and return from function
query all Transaction(payment_order_id == request.payment_order_id). there should be exactly 3 Transactions (step1_payin, step2a_payin-complete, step2b_fufilled"). 
if there isnt then commitError()
else 
    grab the LedgerEntry(transaction: Transaction(step: step2b_fufilled, direction: credit, Account(owner_id != platform))). 
    call payout-api.payout(MakePayoutRequest(idempotency_key: request.payment_order_id, amount: LedgerEntry.amount, currency: LedgerEntry.currency, recipient: LedgerEntry.account)). 
    if this api call returns an error then commitError()
    else
        create a Transaction/LedgerEntry combo:
        Transaction(payment_order_id: id, step: step3_payout)
            LedgerEntry(account: Account(op.seller_id, null), direction: debit, amount, currency)
            LedgerEntry(account: Account(payout, null), direction: credit, amount, currency)
        if that fails then commitError()
        else commit the offset and return from function

consumers.name: processRefund

downstreamDescriptions.ledger-db: Reads the Transactions for the refund's payment_order_id to check whether a step2a_payin-complete Transaction exists.
downstreamDescriptions.payments-api: POSTs refundPayment (idempotency_key = payment_order_id) when the payin was captured (a step2a_payin-complete Transaction exists), otherwise POSTs cancelPayment to void the uncaptured payment.

consumers.description: find Transactions equal to refund.payment_order_id. if there is a Transaction that has step of step2a_payin-complete then call payment-api.refundPayment(idempotency_key: refund.payment_order_id). else call payment-api.cancelPayment(idempotency_key: refund.payment_order_id)

history.description: find Transactions equal to refund.payment_order_id. if there is a Transaction that has step of step2a_payin-complete then call payment-api.refundPayment(idempotency_key: refund.payment_order_id). else call payment-api.cancelPayment(idempotency_key: refund.payment_order_id)
